'''''Knights''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
The cruiser along with a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] called ''[[Doomer]]'' were attempting a secret meeting. However the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] had sent a strike force consisting of [[Missile Boat]]s, one of the starfighters piloted by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] and [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] to capture the Rebel Cruiser and destroy the Bothan Dreadnaught.

Stele cleared a [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]], destroyed all starfighter opposition, destroyed the Dreadnaught and reduced the cruiser's shields and the ship was successfully disabled and captured along with the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Tarken]]''.
